_usage: This is a reference catalog for VSCode (.vscode/mcp.json or %USERPROFILE%\.mcp.json)
_instructions: Cherry-pick entries from 'servers' into your .vscode/mcp.json as needed
_key_differences: Uses 'servers' (not 'mcpServers'), 'stdio' type for commands (not 'local'), tools array NOT required

context7.description: Up-to-date documentation and code examples for any library

memory.description: Knowledge graph for persisting entities and relations across sessions

sequential-thinking.description: Structured chain-of-thought reasoning for complex problems

workiq.description: Microsoft Work IQ for enterprise productivity insights

github.description: GitHub API access for issues, PRs, repos, and code search

filesystem.description: Read/write access to specified directories on the local filesystem

postgres.description: PostgreSQL database access for queries and schema inspection

playwright.description: Browser automation for testing, scraping, and screenshots

brave-search.description: Web search via Brave Search API

fetch.description: HTTP fetch for retrieving and processing web content

lsp-typescript.description: TypeScript language intelligence — type info, diagnostics, definitions, references, type tracing

lsp-python.description: Python language intelligence — type checking, diagnostics, definitions, references
lsp-python.prerequisites: basedpyright installed (npm i -g basedpyright), cclsp.json config in project root

microsoft-learn.description: Official Microsoft Learn MCP - Azure and Microsoft documentation search, fetch, and code samples

session-broker.description: Multi-session coordination for GitHub Copilot CLI — session registry, messaging, conflict detection, heartbeat monitoring
session-broker.note: Start broker first: cd src/session-broker && node index.js
